---
title: "Typst Margin Layout Foundation Test"
papersize: us-letter
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        - ['@preview/drafting:0\.2\.2', '#set-page-properties\(\)', '#set-margin-note-defaults\(']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

::: {.column-margin}
This triggers margin layout.
:::

Main content here.
